choices.text: Hard hat (ANSI Z89.1), safety glasses (Z87.1), steel-toe boots (ASTM F2413), high-vis vest (ANSI 107 Class 2), gloves, hearing protection >85 dB. Task-specific adds respirators, harness, welding helmet, cut-resistant gloves.

Sloping / shoring / shielding required at 5+ ft. Daily inspection by competent person. Egress within 25 ft. Spoils 2 ft from edge. Collapse buries victim under tons of soil in seconds. Major fatality category.
